fields.acceptance_criteria: Continuously validate install and deinstall docs in CI using the Docker harness.
fields.title: Gate install and deinstall documentation continuously in CI
fields.validation_plan: Confirm the CI workflow triggers on relevant docs/tooling changes and emits actionable artifacts for failures.

fields.acceptance_criteria: Continuously validate install and deinstall docs in CI across executable Docker tests, .spec contracts, and .rule-generated README documentation.
fields.title: Gate install and deinstall documentation continuously in CI
fields.validation_plan: Confirm CI triggers on install-related .spec and .rule changes, runs the Docker harness, and fails clearly when executable tests, spec contracts, and generated README output diverge.
